calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-30-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Joel M. Chan, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff via court call. Mr. Chan informs the court that the entire case has settled. An OSC re Dismissal is scheduled for August 30, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
